mapper.select:
SELECT id, code, name, http_method AS httpMethod, path_pattern AS pathPattern, remark, status FROM open_api_endpoint
ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT id, code, name, http_method AS httpMethod, path_pattern AS pathPattern, remark, status FROM open_api_endpoint WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT e.id, e.code, e.name, e.http_method AS httpMethod, e.path_pattern AS pathPattern, e.remark, e.status FROM open_api_endpoint e INNER JOIN open_api_client_endpoint ce ON ce.endpoint_id = e.id WHERE ce.client_id = #{clientId} AND e.deleted = 0 AND e.status = 1
SELECT id, code, name, http_method AS httpMethod, path_pattern AS pathPattern, remark, status FROM open_api_endpoint WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY id
